title: cymbalaria pubescens
intro: Cymbalaria pubescens, also known as the kidney vetch or ivy-leaved toadflax, is a flowering plant belonging to the family Scrophulariaceae. It is a climbing plant with heart-shaped leaves and small, blue or white flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, and it is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues. Cymbalaria pubescens is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, and it is also used in some herbal remedies to treat various health conditions.
